data.description:
## Why
Two coaching situations rebar cannot currently express well. DEFERRED_MEASUREMENT was REJECTED as a move (counter-architectural -- see below).

## What
- Add foundation/enhancement split move: "Ship a working baseline of {subject} now; make the enhanced version a dependent follow-on." Distinct from move 7 (scope axis) -- this is the FIDELITY axis.
- Sharpen move 9 (plan verification) to cover restating an unobservable/deferred success target as an in-session-observable one (the verifiable-proxy remediation for an F1.in_session_evaluable block).
- DO NOT add DEFERRED_MEASUREMENT: it would coach ACs that F1.in_session_evaluable (BLOCKING) rejects and the fail-closed completion verifier cannot certify. Genuinely post-hoc validation is handled by the emergent-work pattern (create a follow-up ticket + link discovered_from), keeping the current ticket in-session-closable.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] foundation/enhancement move added (locked template, bounded {subject})
- [ ] move 9 sharpened for verifiable-proxy
- [ ] Coaching for post-hoc validation routes to a discovered_from follow-up ticket, never to deferring the current AC
data.title: WS8: Coach move registry updates
